14-1.gem.flo.cex: and one day her husband I think adopted or brought in a new child into the house .
14-1.gem.flo.cex: and or the three sisters did not like the new child .
14-1.gem.flo.cex: and they commanded her to do all kinds of menial work and tasks and do their laundry and sweep the floors .

14-1.gem.flo.cex: and be it horses or dogs or even mice she was very friendly to animals .
14-1.gem.flo.cex: so what love she didn't get from the sisters in the household she got from the little creatures that surrounded her every day when she was going about her tasks .

14-1.gem.flo.cex: so Cinderella thought that that included her because the whole household was invited .

14-1.gem.flo.cex: and furthermore they told her that she was not only not invited but she was not appropriately dressed and did not have a dress that would suit the occasion .

14-1.gem.flo.cex: you must be back by midnight or you're gonna turn into a pumpkin .

14-1.gem.flo.cex: so the prince knew that the owner of the shoe was the woman that he wanted to marry .

363-1.gem.flo.cex: they use Cinderella basically as their maid , as their assistant and actually are pretty negative and treat her very negatively .
